docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ATANASOV, GEORGIO D.B.A. DRYFAST AS TO DEFENDANT LINDINGER, KARL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-26-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-14-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MADELINE QUINN--EMPLOYEE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2012 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-15-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. " PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD THE CORRECT DEFENDANT AND DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE DEFENDANT KARL LINDINGER", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOCELYN ARRIOLGA--SENIOR ACCOUNT MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOACLYN ARRIOGO---PROJECT MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 66.95 - SERVED SEP-04-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LINDINGER, KARL
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT LINDINGER, KARL
DECLARATION OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OF THE DEFENDANT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATANASOV, GEORGIO D.B.A. DRYFAST
DECLARATION OF GEORGIO ATANASOV FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATANASOV, GEORGIO D.B.A. DRYFAST
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LINDINGER, KARL HEARING SET FOR DEC-18-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
RETURNED MAIL: ORDER AFTER HEARING AND NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED TO KARL LINDINGER.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATANASOV, GEORGIO D.B.A. DRYFAST
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATANASOV, GEORGIO D.B.A. DRYFAST

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY KARL LINDINGER IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JAN-18-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. APPEARANCE BY MOVING PARTY ONLY. JDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LEVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATANASOV, GEORGIO D.B.A. DRYFAST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LINDINGER, KARL $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $141.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,141.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
